title: Battalion v1.2.35
content:
Battalion has been updated to v1.2.35, splitting its routing to serve a minimalist landing page at the root URL (/) and the main tracker SPA workspace at (/home), fully integrated with the local dev server and production Apache rules.

What changed:

  • Minimalist Landing Page: Created a new premium editorial landing page at the root URL using the exact off-white layout format, 36px white banners, left-aligned typography, and bright crimson transitions.
  • Split Routing Scheme: Moved the tracker SPA workspace to the /home URL scheme.
  • Vite Dev Middleware: Integrated a custom configureServer hook in the Vite configuration to handle dev-mode split routing natively on the client port.
  • Robots Noindex Meta-tag: Added a robots noindex meta-tag to the client index.html to prevent indexing of the active tracking dashboard.
  • Apache Rewrite Configurations: Updated the production .htaccess rewrite rules in the main repository to handle the landing and SPA routing splits natively on Apache static hosting.
